name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: First Cash Pawn at 3255 E Platte Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80909 in the Southeast Colorado Springs neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.0 stars across 46 reviews. Call +1 719-578-0657.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international operator of pawn stores globally. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need quick access to funds or affordable merchandise. With approximately 22,000 employees, FirstCash maintains a significant presence across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador).

FirstCash's core business model centers on pawn loans secured by personal property collateral, retail merchandise sales, and gold/precious metal buying. Customers can pledge jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and other items to receive immediate cash loans. The company also operates a layaway service requiring 10% down payments, provides gold and precious metal purchasing services, and maintains inventory of used merchandise for resale. Additionally, through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself as the largest pawn chain globally with unmatched geographic reach and scale. The company is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating significant market capitalization and institutional credibility. Their "what we buy" model accepts almost any item of value, and their "store locator" tool provides transparency about 2,500+ North and Latin American locations. The brand emphasizes speed ("pawn loan fast") and accessibility for underbanked consumers without requiring traditional credit checks.

FirstCash serves a legitimate financial need for consumers requiring immediate cash without credit qualification, though pawn loans carry implicit costs through the loan-to-value ratio and interest rates that are not disclosed on the website. The company's strength lies in geographic accessibility and merchandise variety, but potential borrowers should understand that defaulting on a pawn loan results in loss of collateral. The business model is transparent and legal, though it primarily serves financially vulnerable populations.
address: 3255 E Platte Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

company_info.headquarters: 3255 E Platte Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

pros: Largest international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations providing unmatched geographic accessibility
Instant cash availability without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Non-recourse loans mean only collateral is at risk, not additional collection action or credit damage
Accepts wide variety of items (jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, sporting goods, appliances)
Gold and precious metal buying service with cash on-the-spot payment
Layaway service option with only 10% down payment required for merchandise purchases
S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 listing indicates institutional credibility and financial stability
cons: Interest rates and loan-to-value ratios not disclosed on website, requiring in-store inquiry
Defaulting results in loss of pledged personal property with no recovery option
Targets primarily cash-constrained and credit-limited populations, indicating higher-cost alternative to traditional lending
Service fees and terms of non-recourse loans not transparently disclosed online
Layaway requires multiple visits/payments and ties up capital for uncertain periods
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000 range) without credit checks or bank account requirements
People with items of value but poor credit history who need short-term liquidity
Individuals looking to buy discounted used merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools) at reduced prices
Those seeking to sell gold, silver, or platinum jewelry for immediate cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash without credit qualification and have items of personal value to pledge as collateral. The key caveat is that while pawn loans are non-recourse (no credit damage), defaulting results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and the actual interest rates/terms are not disclosed on the website, so borrowers must visit a store for pricing details before committing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property collateral
Retail sales of used jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold and precious metal buying services with on-the-spot cash payment
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Retail finance payment solutions for consumer goods and services
Store locator tool for finding nearest pawn shop location
